symbols.name: Sync::Map
symbols.documentation:
A thread-safe map (Hash) that is safe for concurrent use
by multiple fibers without additional locking or coordination.

The API mirrors Go's `sync.Map` with Crystal-idiomatic aliases.

Uses Sync::Mutex(:unchecked) — a fast nsync-style mutex (cosmopolitan/nsync
adaptation) with no deadlock detection overhead. Safe because Sync::Map
never locks recursively and always properly pairs lock/unlock.

Upstream sources:
- Go stdlib sync.Map: vendor/go/src/sync/map.go (Go 1.24+, HashTrieMap-backed)
- xsync.Map: vendor/xsync/map.go (puzpuzpuz/xsync, CLHT-based)

symbols.name: Sync::Map::ComputeOp
symbols.documentation: Operations for the `compute` method, matching xsync.ComputeOp.

symbols.name: Sync::Map::default_value
symbols.documentation: Returns the zero/default value of type V.

symbols.name: new
symbols.documentation: Creates a new map initialized from a standard Hash.

symbols.name: load
symbols.documentation:
--- Go sync.Map parity ---
Returns the value stored in the map for a key, or zero value if absent.
The ok result indicates whether value was found in the map.

symbols.name: store
symbols.signature: def store(key : K, value : V) : Nil
symbols.documentation: Sets the value for a key.

symbols.name: delete
symbols.documentation: Deletes the value for a key. Does nothing if the key is absent.

symbols.name: clear
symbols.documentation: Deletes all entries, resulting in an empty map.

symbols.name: load_or_store
symbols.signature: def load_or_store(key : K, value : V) : {V, Bool}
symbols.documentation:
Returns the existing value for the key if present.
Otherwise, stores and returns the given value.
The loaded result is true if the value was loaded, false if stored.

symbols.name: load_and_delete
symbols.documentation:
Deletes the value for a key, returning the previous value if any.
The loaded result reports whether the key was present.

symbols.name: swap
symbols.signature: def swap(key : K, value : V) : {V, Bool}
symbols.documentation:
Swaps the value for a key and returns the previous value if any.
The loaded result reports whether the key was present.
When the key is absent, stores the value and returns loaded=false.

symbols.name: compare_and_swap
symbols.signature: def compare_and_swap(key : K, old : V, new : V) : Bool
symbols.documentation: Swaps old and new values for key if the current value equals old.

symbols.name: compare_and_delete
symbols.signature: def compare_and_delete(key : K, old : V) : Bool
symbols.documentation:
Deletes the entry for key if its value equals old.
If there is no current value for key, returns false.

symbols.name: size
symbols.documentation: Returns the number of entries in the map.

symbols.name: empty?
symbols.documentation: Returns true if the map is empty.

symbols.name: has_key?
symbols.documentation: Returns true if the key is present.

symbols.name: keys
symbols.documentation: Returns all keys.

symbols.name: values
symbols.documentation: Returns all values.

symbols.name: has_value?
symbols.documentation:
--- Crystal Hash parity ---
Returns true if the value is present.

symbols.name: key_for
symbols.documentation: Returns the key for the given value. Raises KeyError if absent.

symbols.name: key_for
symbols.signature: def key_for(value : V, & : V -> K) : K
symbols.documentation: Returns the key for value, or yields the value to the block if absent.

symbols.name: key_for?
symbols.documentation: Returns the key for the given value, or nil if absent.

symbols.name: put_if_absent
symbols.signature: def put_if_absent(key : K, value : V) : V
symbols.documentation:
If the key is absent, stores the value and returns it.
If the key is present, returns the existing value.

symbols.name: put_if_absent
symbols.signature: def put_if_absent(key : K, & : K -> V) : V
symbols.documentation:
If the key is absent, calls the block, stores the result, and returns it.
If the key is present, returns the existing value.

symbols.name: shift
symbols.documentation: Removes and returns the first key-value pair. Raises IndexError if empty.

symbols.name: shift?
symbols.documentation: Removes and returns the first key-value pair, or nil if empty.

symbols.name: dup
symbols.documentation: Returns a shallow copy of the map.

symbols.name: merge!
symbols.documentation: Merges entries from another Hash into this map, overwriting existing keys.

symbols.name: select
symbols.signature: def select(& : K, V -> _) : Sync::Map(K, V)
symbols.documentation: Returns a new map with entries for which the block returns true.

symbols.name: reject
symbols.signature: def reject(& : K, V -> _) : Sync::Map(K, V)
symbols.documentation: Returns a new map with entries for which the block returns false.

symbols.name: first_key
symbols.documentation: Returns the first key in the map.

symbols.name: first_key?
symbols.documentation: Returns the first key, or nil if empty.

symbols.name: last_key
symbols.documentation: Returns the last key in the map.

symbols.name: last_key?
symbols.documentation: Returns the last key, or nil if empty.

symbols.name: first_value
symbols.documentation: Returns the first value in the map.

symbols.name: first_value?
symbols.documentation: Returns the first value, or nil if empty.

symbols.name: last_value
symbols.documentation: Returns the last value in the map.

symbols.name: last_value?
symbols.documentation: Returns the last value, or nil if empty.

symbols.name: load_and_store
symbols.signature: def load_and_store(key : K, value : V) : {V, Bool}
symbols.documentation:
--- xsync extended API ---
Returns the existing value for the key if present,
while setting the new value for the key.
Stores the new value and returns the existing one if present.
The loaded result is true if the existing value was loaded.

symbols.name: load_or_compute
symbols.documentation:
Returns the existing value for the key if present.
Otherwise, computes the value using the provided block and stores it.
The block must return a {value, cancel} tuple.
If cancel is true, the key is not stored.
The loaded result is true if the value was loaded, false if computed.

symbols.name: compute
symbols.signature: def compute(key : K, & : V, Bool -> {V, ComputeOp}) : {V, Bool}
symbols.documentation:
Performs an atomic compute operation on the value for key.
The block receives (old_value, loaded) and returns {new_value, op}.
op is a ComputeOp: Update to set, Delete to remove, Cancel to do nothing.
Returns {actual, ok} where ok indicates the entry is present after the call.

symbols.name: delete_matching
symbols.signature: def delete_matching(& : K, V -> {Bool, Bool}) : Int32
symbols.documentation:
Deletes all entries for which the block returns {true, _}.
If the block returns {_, true}, iteration stops immediately.
Returns the number of deleted entries.

symbols.name: fetch
symbols.signature: def fetch(key : K, default : V) : V
symbols.documentation: Returns value for key or the given default.

symbols.name: fetch
symbols.signature: def fetch(key : K, & : K -> V) : V
symbols.documentation: Returns value for key or yields the key to the block if absent.

symbols.name: update
symbols.signature: def update(key : K, & : V -> V) : V
symbols.documentation: Updates the existing value for key via the block. Raises KeyError if absent.

symbols.name: dig
symbols.documentation: Traverses nested structures using #dig on each level. Raises on missing key.

symbols.name: dig
symbols.documentation: Returns the value at key. Raises on missing key.

symbols.name: dig?
symbols.documentation: Traverses nested structures using #dig? on each level. Returns nil on miss.

symbols.name: dig?
symbols.documentation: Returns the value at key or nil.

symbols.name: select!
symbols.documentation:
--- More Crystal Hash parity ---
Iterates all keys.
Removes entries for which the block returns false.

symbols.name: reject!
symbols.documentation: Removes entries for which the block returns true.

symbols.name: transform_keys
symbols.signature: def transform_keys(& : K, V -> K) : Sync::Map(K, V)
symbols.documentation: Returns a new map with transformed keys.

symbols.name: transform_values
symbols.signature: def transform_values(& : V, K -> V) : Sync::Map(K, V)
symbols.documentation: Returns a new map with transformed values.

symbols.name: merge
symbols.signature: def merge(other : Hash(K, V)) : Sync::Map(K, V)
symbols.documentation:
Returns a new map containing entries from self and other.
Entries from other overwrite self's entries for duplicate keys.

symbols.name: compact
symbols.documentation: Returns a new map without nil values.

symbols.name: compact!
symbols.documentation: Removes nil values in place.

symbols.name: to_a
symbols.documentation: Returns an Array of {K, V} tuples.

symbols.name: select
symbols.documentation:
--- More Crystal Hash parity 2 ---
Returns a new map containing only the given keys.

symbols.name: select
symbols.documentation: Returns a new map containing only the given keys (varargs).

symbols.name: reject
symbols.documentation: Returns a new map excluding the given keys.

symbols.name: reject
symbols.documentation: Returns a new map excluding the given keys (varargs).

symbols.name: merge
symbols.signature: def merge(other : Hash(K, V), & : K, V, V -> V) : Sync::Map(K, V)
symbols.documentation:
Returns a new map with entries from self and other.
The block resolves conflicts: |key, old_val, new_val| -> resolved_val.

symbols.name: merge!
symbols.signature: def merge!(other : Hash(K, V), & : K, V, V -> V) : self
symbols.documentation: Merges entries from other into self, with optional conflict resolution.

symbols.name: transform_keys!
symbols.signature: def transform_keys!(& : K, V -> K) : self
symbols.documentation: Transforms keys in place.

symbols.name: transform_values!
symbols.signature: def transform_values!(& : V, K -> V) : self
symbols.documentation: Transforms values in place.

symbols.name: invert
symbols.documentation: Returns a new map with keys and values swapped.

symbols.name: values_at
symbols.documentation: Returns an array of values for the given keys. Raises KeyError on missing key.

symbols.name: clone
symbols.documentation: Returns a deep copy (clones values too).

symbols.name: to_h
symbols.documentation: Returns the underlying Hash representation (snapshot).

symbols.name: Stats
symbols.documentation:
--- Stats ---
Statistics for diagnostic purposes.

symbols.name: stats
symbols.documentation: Returns statistics about the map. O(N) operation, for diagnostics only.

symbols.name: each
symbols.documentation:
--- Block-less iterators ---
Yields each key-value pair as {K, V} tuple (Enumerable contract).

symbols.name: each
symbols.documentation: Without block, returns a snapshot iterator.

symbols.name: range
symbols.documentation: Go sync.Map Range semantics: iterates entries, stops when block returns falsey.

symbols.name: each_key
symbols.documentation: Iterates all keys (snapshot-based).

symbols.name: each_key
symbols.documentation: Without block, returns an iterator over snapshot keys.

symbols.name: each_value
symbols.documentation: Iterates all values (snapshot-based).

symbols.name: each_value
symbols.documentation: Without block, returns an iterator over snapshot values.

symbols.name: select!
symbols.documentation:
--- In-place key-based filtering ---
Removes all entries except those with the given keys.

symbols.name: reject!
symbols.documentation: Removes entries with the given keys.
